action.description: The committee on HLT recommend that the measure be PASSED, WITH AMENDMENTS. The votes were as follows: 8 Ayes: Representative(s) Takayama, Keohokapu-Lee Loy, Takenouchi, Alcos, Garcia; Ayes with reservations: Representative(s) Amato, Hartsfield, Marten;  Noes: none; and 1 Excused: Representative(s) Olds.
